name: Rewrite bloated README
scenario: Rewrite a bloated DataPipe README to be concise and useful

assertions.text: Removes or rewrites the generic 'Welcome to DataPipe!' introduction
Removes or condenses the vague 'Easy to use, Highly configurable' features list
Adds or preserves a real code/usage example (the README had none)
Result is shorter than the original (~60 lines)
Either adds real usage examples or notes that the original lacked them
